quest.007F4A173D5CA51F.quest_desc.original:
"Commune" was probably a stretch.

You will need the souls of specific mobs, and that means cosplaying as the Grim Reaper and swinging a &aScythe&r.

Mobs will release their spirits when killed with the &aScythe&r, meaning you'll need to hunt down specific monsters for their souls.

&7&oSpoilers on the next page ->
{@pagebreak}
Zombies and Skeletons should have all of the souls you need for this craft.
quest.007F4A173D5CA51F.quest_desc.translation:
「密談」這個詞可能有點言過其實。

你會需要某些生物的靈魂，這代表你會需要假裝自己是死神，到處揮動&a鐮刀&r。

當你用&a鐮刀&r殺死怪物時，他們的靈魂會被釋放出來。所以你要去獵殺某些怪物，取得他們的靈魂。

&7&o下一頁有暴雷->
{@pagebreak}
殭屍和骷髏有著你這次配方所需要的所有靈魂。

quest.02735F0443CA9727.quest_desc.original:
These compasses point to locations of &3Vaults.

&7&oThe Compass can be Sneak + Right-clicked when within 256 blocks from the vault to instantly teleport to the entrance!&r
quest.02735F0443CA9727.quest_desc.translation:
這個羅盤指向一座&3寶庫&r的確切地點。

&7&o在寶庫的 256 格內手持羅盤「潛行 + 右鍵」\n可以快速傳送至寶庫入口！&r

quest.02BC8FCDB2D94F0E.quest_desc.original:
Submitting the blocks required for the &3Upgrade&f and claiming its rewards will automatically assemble your team's &6World Engine&r.

&eNote&f: Any blocks placed where an upgrade should go will be voided.
quest.02BC8FCDB2D94F0E.quest_desc.translation:
提交該&3升級&r所需的方塊並領取該獎勵會自動將它組裝到你們隊伍的&6世界引擎&r之中。

&e備註&f：任何放置在該升級所需位置的所有方塊都會被銷毀。

quest.0306C0D774144DAD.quest_desc.original:
This compass points to the location of a &3Vault.

&7&oThe Compass can be Sneak + Right-clicked when within 256 blocks from the vault to instantly teleport to the entrance!&r
quest.0306C0D774144DAD.quest_desc.translation:
這個羅盤指向一座&3寶庫&r的確切地點。

&7&o在寶庫的 256 格內手持羅盤「潛行 + 右鍵」\n可以快速傳送至寶庫入口！&r

quest.066342488E03F3B5.quest_desc.original:
&bDiamonds&r make for great tools, but they tend to be brittle and shatter.

Using an &aAtomic Reconstructor&r, you can reinforce them to make them even stronger.

The &aReconstructor&r requires a special material to be crafted. The &2Geologist&r will know exactly where to find the crystal it needs.
quest.066342488E03F3B5.quest_desc.translation:
&b鑽石&r能夠做成很好的工具，但它們往往很脆弱、很易碎。

你可以使用&a原子重構器&r來強化它們，讓它們變得更強大。

&a重構器&r需要用一種特殊的材料來製作。&2地質學家&r知道該如何找到這種水晶。

quest.0B69B9E1209A9234.quest_desc.original:
While the main goal will be to upgrade the &bWorld Engine&r with the &cAdvanced Machine Blocks&r, you'll need to upgrade how it handles power first.

Installing a single &cNitro Tier Ender Cell&r should allow it to handle more complex crafts related to the power of the &eEnd&r.

Of course, this will require at least one &dNether Star&r.

Return to the &dEcho of The Catalyst&r so they may show you how to upgrade your &6World Engine&r.
quest.0B69B9E1209A9234.quest_desc.translation:
就算你的主要目標是用&c高級機器方塊&r升級&b世界引擎&r，但你還是需要先升級它處理能量的方式。

安裝一顆&c終界單元（地獄之星）&r可為它提供來自&e終界&r的力量，讓它足以處理更多更複雜的合成配方。

當然，這會需要至少一顆&d地獄之星&r。

返回&r器械尊者&r處，然後他會教你該如何升級你的&6世界引擎&r。

quest.0E7AD6BCF9F8605F.quest_desc.original:
Now that the &6World Engine&r can handle some &dEnder&r crafts, you will need to get your hands on a &dDragon Egg&r without going to the &eEnd&r.

Within the &eEnd&r ring, you'll be able to find a very special &3Vault&r with a dangerous fight inside. And maybe a Dragon Egg.

You will need to craft the &dMighty Ender Chicken Egg&r and use it in the &aDislocator Receptacle&r in the middle ring to summon the boss.
{@pagebreak}
This can be a very difficult fight if you are not prepared!

The &dMighty Ender Chicken&r spawns with a shield that needs to be broken before it can take damage. This can only be broken by being whacked by a &2Chicken Stick&r.

This boss also has several different attacks, including a laser that will most likely kill you. Make sure to hide during this attack!
{@pagebreak}
Once you have your hands on a &dDragon Egg&r, the &6World Engine&r should be able to extract its essence into block form.

Return to the &dEcho of The Catalyst&r once again to find out how to upgrade your &6World Engine&r.

["", {"text": "Note", "color": "yellow"}, ": It's worth setting up an ", {"text": "Extractor", "color": "green", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": { "action": "change_page", "value": "0EBA58B7FD2AF36D"}, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "Go to Extractor Quest"} }, " to get more ", {"text": "Dragon Eggs", "color": "light_purple"}, ", or you can redo the fight over and over." ]

&7&oSetup on the next page ->
{@pagebreak}
{image:ftb:textures/quests/dragon_egg_extraction.png width:70 height:200 align:center}
quest.0E7AD6BCF9F8605F.quest_desc.translation:
現在&6世界引擎&r能夠處理&d更終界&r的合成配方了，你會需要開始在不前往&e終界&r的情況下，著手準備一顆&d龍蛋&r。

在&e終界&r環帶中，你有機會找到一座非常特別的&3寶庫&r：裡面有著非常危險的戰鬥，說不定還有一顆龍蛋。

你會需要合成一顆&d偉大終界雞蛋&r，並對著中間的&a傳送門定位器&r使用它，就能召喚出 Boss。
{@pagebreak}
如果你沒有準備好的話，這場戰鬥可能會十分艱難！

&d偉大終界雞&r會召喚一座盾牌，你會需要先破壞這座盾牌才能對牠造成傷害。它只能被&2雞棒&r敲碎。

這隻 Boss 有很多種不同的攻擊方式，包含：\n一束很可能會殺死你的雷射激光。最好在此攻擊時躲藏！
{@pagebreak}
當你取得了&d龍蛋&r之後，&6世界引擎&r將能夠吸收&d龍蛋&r方塊的力量。

再次返回&d器械尊者&r處以找出你該如何升級你的&6世界引擎&r。

["", {"text": "備註", "color": "yellow"}, "：你最好為", {"text": "龍蛋", "color": "light_purple"}, "設置一台", {"text": "提取器", "color": "green", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": { "action": "change_page", "value": "0EBA58B7FD2AF36D"}, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "前往「提取器」任務"} }, "以方便你取得它，或是你也可以一次又一次地重複這場戰鬥。" ]

&7&o下一頁有設置範例 ->
{@pagebreak}
{image:ftb:textures/quests/dragon_egg_extraction.png width:70 height:200 align:center}

quest.0FD446B7912E00CB.quest_desc.original: It's time to combine each of the pieces together to create the &cAdvanced Machine Blocks&r.
quest.0FD446B7912E00CB.quest_desc.translation: 是時候將所有的零件組合為&c高級機器方塊&r了。

quest.0FF5D73B3256F400.quest_desc.original:
Submitting the blocks required for the &3Upgrade&f and claiming its rewards will automatically assemble your team's &6World Engine&r.

&eNote&f: Any blocks placed where an upgrade should go will be voided.
quest.0FF5D73B3256F400.quest_desc.translation:
提交該&3升級&r所需的方塊並領取該獎勵會自動將它組裝到你們隊伍的&6世界引擎&r之中。

&e備註&f：任何放置在該升級所需位置的所有方塊都會被銷毀。

quest.11BB3C62703E0B3E.quest_desc.original:
Encasing spirits directly into a block is probably not the most ethical thing to do, but the &6World Engine&r can harness that power for more advanced crafts.

Bring this back to &dThe Infernal&r to learn how to install the &3Spirit Block Upgrade&r.
quest.11BB3C62703E0B3E.quest_desc.translation:
將靈魂囚禁在方塊內或許並不符合道德，但現在&6世界引擎&r能夠汲取其中所蘊含的力量來完成更多高級的合成配方了。

將它帶給&d煉獄炎魔&r，他會告訴你該如何安裝這項&3世界引擎升級&r。

quest.11F69E1E4FE4D5CD.quest_desc.original:
The advanced circuitry you need will require a specialized crystal called &dFluxite&r.

This crystal can only be created by beaming power directly into an &dAmethyst Crystal&r. To do this, you will need to create an &cEnderic Laser&r and a &bTarget Designator&r.
{@pagebreak}
Once you've crafted the &cEnderic Laser&r, make sure to build it near a &dBudding Amethyst Block&r that can grow crystals.

By Sneak + Right-clicking with the &bTarget Designator&r on an &dAmethyst Crystal&r, you can store the location into the Designator. Once stored, Sneak + Right-click on the &cEnderic Laser&r to designate where the laser should shoot.

If done properly, the laser will fire and convert the crystal over into &dFluxite&r.

Use this to craft the &dFlux Gate&r.
quest.11F69E1E4FE4D5CD.quest_desc.translation:
你會需要一種被稱作&d通量水晶&r的特殊水晶才能完成你需要的高級電路元件。

當&d紫水晶晶簇&r被雷射打中，進入它的激發態後就會變成這種水晶。你會需要一台&c終界雷射&r漢醫台&b目標指定器&r才能完成上述任務。
{@pagebreak}
當你合成出&c終界雷射&r之後，建議將它蓋在能不斷長出紫水晶的&d紫水晶芽床&r的旁邊。

使用&b目標指定器&r「潛行+右鍵」點擊&d紫水晶晶簇&r能夠將它的位置資訊儲存於指定器之中。當你有了位置資訊之後，繼續使用它「潛行+右鍵」點擊&c終界雷射&r就能指定雷射應該射擊的位置。

如果你操作得當的話，將會發出一道雷射，並將紫水晶轉化為&d通量水晶&r。

現在，使用它來合成&d通量閘&r吧。

quest.13E0F74B9A1DAB58.quest_desc.original:
This compass points to the location of a &3Vault.

&7&oThe Compass can be Sneak + Right-clicked when within 256 blocks from the vault to instantly teleport to the entrance!&r
quest.13E0F74B9A1DAB58.quest_desc.translation:
這個羅盤指向一座&3寶庫&r的確切地點。

&7&o在寶庫的 256 格內手持羅盤「潛行 + 右鍵」\n可以快速傳送至寶庫入口！&r

quest.1680080BED98F027.quest_desc.original: Claiming this quest reward will set a waypoint at the &dEcho's &6Archive&r entrance.
quest.1680080BED98F027.quest_desc.translation: 領取該任務的任務獎勵會幫你在該&d回聲&r的&6檔案庫&r的入口處設置一個定位點。

quest.1F1A15B6E079F31F.quest_desc.original:
Crafting the circuitry for the &cAdvanced Machine Blocks&r will require more than just a steady hand.

You'll need a machine that can be very precise for this. The &aAssembler&r should do the trick.

&eNote&r: To assemble this machine, you'll need 3 &aMachine Cores&r of any tier.

[{"text": "", "color": "gray", "italic": true}, "If you wish to learn more about Oritech, check out the ", { "text": "Oritech Chapter", "color": "gray", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": { "action": "change_page", "value": "1FD2F304ADC237D0"}, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "Go to Oritech Questline"} }, "."]
quest.1F1A15B6E079F31F.quest_desc.translation:
只靠著你那雙手是無法完成&c高級機器方塊&r所需的電路元件的。

你會需要一台能夠完成精細操作的機器。&a組裝機&r就能夠很好地完成上述任務。

&e備註&r：你會需要三個任意階級的&a機器核心&r才能組裝出這台機器。

[{"text": "", "color": "gray", "italic": true}, "如果你想要學習更多關於《起源科技》模組的玩法的話，請查看", { "text": "《起源科技》章節", "color": "gray", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": { "action": "change_page", "value": "1FD2F304ADC237D0"}, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "前往「《起源科技》」任務線"} }, "。"]

quest.21E1A72027DBF236.quest_desc.original:
Submitting the blocks required for the &3Upgrade&f and claiming its rewards will automatically assemble your team's &6World Engine&r.

&eNote&f: Any blocks placed where an upgrade should go will be voided.
quest.21E1A72027DBF236.quest_desc.translation:
提交該&3升級&r所需的方塊並領取該獎勵會自動將它組裝到你們隊伍的&6世界引擎&r之中。

&e備註&f：任何放置在該升級所需位置的所有方塊都會被銷毀。

quest.26F3ECD3CC9E7CDA.quest_desc.original:
The &cAdvanced Machine Blocks&r are a modern wonder of technology.

Bring these back to &dThe Catalyst&r, and they'll show you how to install this &3World Engine Upgrade&r.
quest.26F3ECD3CC9E7CDA.quest_desc.translation:
&c高級機器方塊&r是現代科技的奇蹟。

將它們帶給&d器械尊者&r，他會告訴你該如何安裝這項&3世界引擎升級&r。

quest.2D110AB9A38178C5.quest_desc.original:
Hidden deep within netherrack, &dThe Infernal&r mentioned a buried &3Vault&r in the &cNether&r ring that is home to a very dangerous burning soul.

The &3Vault&r comes alive once the jukebox is activated with its favorite song.

&eNote&r: This vault is dangerous. Come prepared for a fight!
{@pagebreak}
To unlock the &3Vault&r, you will need to complete the dance once activated by the music disc. You can kill the &cBlazes&r to increase your &cHeat&r, or you can do the dance by following the lightest colored floor tiles.
quest.2D110AB9A38178C5.quest_desc.translation:
&d煉獄炎魔&r提到，於&c地獄&r環帶，地獄石的深處之中，埋藏著一座&3寶庫&r，寶庫之中有著一位非常危險的熾熱之魂。

該&3寶庫&r會在唱片箱播放了祂最喜歡的歌曲之後開啟。

&e備註&r：該寶庫非常危險。請為這場戰鬥做好準備！
{@pagebreak}
要解鎖該&3寶庫&r的話，你必須要在放入唱片之後完成一次舞蹈。你可以透過擊殺&c烈焰使者&r來增加你的&c熱度&r，或著你也可以跟著地板上最亮的方塊進行跳舞。

quest.2EA7D8A9632F845F.quest_desc.original:
Submitting the blocks required for the &3Upgrade&f and claiming its rewards will automatically assemble your team's &6World Engine&r.

&eNote&f: Any blocks placed where an upgrade should go will be voided.
quest.2EA7D8A9632F845F.quest_desc.translation:
提交該&3升級&r所需的方塊並領取該獎勵會自動將它組裝到你們隊伍的&6世界引擎&r之中。

&e備註&f：任何放置在該升級所需位置的所有方塊都會被銷毀。

quest.38124EBC1E14AB38.quest_desc.original:
This tormented soul holds the secret to another &6World Engine&r upgrade.

Slay the guardian of the &3Vault&r to acquire Ignitium ingots.
quest.38124EBC1E14AB38.quest_desc.translation:
這位飽受折磨的靈魂掌握了通往下一項&6世界引擎&r升級的秘密。

殺死這位&3寶庫&r中的守衛以取得一些熾焰錠。

quest.3819423319D1A414.quest_desc.original:
With a few more &6World Engine&r upgrades unlocked, the &dEcho of Guidance&r will have more for you to discover.

After your chat, more &6Archives&r will be unlocked!
quest.3819423319D1A414.quest_desc.translation:
隨著更多&6世界引擎&r升級的解鎖，&d指引嚮導之回聲&r提供了更多指引供你探索。

當你與他交談過後，將會解鎖更多的&6資料庫&r！

quest.3AB006907366227A.quest_desc.original:
Infusing a spirit into anything is not usually... &owelcomed&r, one could say.

["To start this process, you'll need a ", {"text": "Spirit Altar", "color": "green"}, " to commune with spirits. You can find ", {"text": "Runewood Trees", "color": "dark_green"}, " within the ", { "text": "Arcane Grove", "color": "light_purple", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": { "action": "change_page", "value": "066B47D2AB72355C" }, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "Go to Arcane Grove Quest"}}, " just be ready to put up a fight."]

Once you've harvested some of the &2Runewood&r, you will need a single piece of &dRefined Soulstone&r to create the altar.

["This requires either throwing raw ores into the ", {"text": "Weeping Well", "color": "blue", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": { "action": "change_page", "value": "754ADB22C6B8041F"}, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "Go to Weeping Well Quest"}}, " structure, or ", {"text": "The Magician", "color": "light_purple"}, " can help you out for the right price."]
quest.3AB006907366227A.quest_desc.translation:
將靈魂注入任何東西之中並不十分...&o光鮮亮麗&r，通常來說。

["要進行這個過程的話，你會需要一台", {"text": "精魂祭壇", "color": "green"}, "來和靈魂密談。你可以在", { "text": "祕法源林", "color": "light_purple", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": { "action": "change_page", "value": "066B47D2AB72355C" }, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "前往「祕法源林」任務"}}, "處找到", {"text": "符文木", "color": "dark_green"}, "，只是你要準備好迎接一場戰鬥。"]

當你採集到了一些&2符文木&r，你還會需要一顆&d精製靈魂石&r來打造出這座祭壇。

["你會需要將一些原礦投入", {"text": "流淚古井", "color": "blue", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": { "action": "change_page", "value": "754ADB22C6B8041F"}, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "前往「流淚古井」任務"}}, "結構之中才能獲得它，或是從", {"text": "魔法長老", "color": "light_purple"}, "那買來一些。"]

quest.500074C1D4EC9591.quest_desc.original:
With more &6Archives&r unlocked, it is time to explore the lobby and find the &dEcho of the Catalyst&r.

Work with this &dEcho&r to unlock several &3Upgrades&r, including the &cAdvanced Machine Block&r upgrade for your &bWorld Engine&r!

&7&oYou may teleport directly to this Echo from anywhere in the lobby after meeting them using &e/echo catalyst&7.
quest.500074C1D4EC9591.quest_desc.translation:
隨著更多&6檔案庫&r的解鎖，是時候探索大廳並找出&d器械尊者之回聲&r了。

和這位&d回聲&r協力解鎖多項&3升級&r，包含你的&6世界引擎&r的&c高級機器方塊&r升級！

&7&o你可以在初訪這位回聲後，於大廳的任何地方使用下列指令傳送至他身旁：「&e/echo catalyst&7」。

quest.55D17BDE3E9C81CC.quest_desc.original:
Submitting the blocks required for the &3Upgrade&f and claiming its rewards will automatically assemble your team's &6World Engine&r.

&eNote&f: Any blocks placed where an upgrade should go will be voided.
quest.55D17BDE3E9C81CC.quest_desc.translation:
提交該&3升級&r所需的方塊並領取該獎勵會自動將它組裝到你們隊伍的&6世界引擎&r之中。

&e備註&f：任何放置在該升級所需位置的所有方塊都會被銷毀。

quest.5A04F7A95366D15F.quest_desc.original:
Reconstructing diamonds into &bDiamatine&r is only the first step into creating the core for the &cAdvanced Machine Blocks&r.

This core needs to allow power to flow through it properly. Using an &bEmpowering Setup&r, you should be able to empower diamonds for this exact purpose.

&eNote&r: The setup requires an &aEmpowerer&r as the center of the setup, with 4 &2Display Stands&r connected to power, two blocks away from each side of the &aEmpowerer&r.
quest.5A04F7A95366D15F.quest_desc.translation:
將鑽石重構為&b鑽石晶&r是建構&c高級機器方塊&r核心的第一步。

它的核心必須要使能量能夠正確的流過它。如果你使用這些&b充能設備&r的話，你就能夠將鑽石充能，使它們能夠達成上述特性。

&e備註&r：正確的設備擺放方式是：在中間放置一台接上能量的&a充能器&r，在它的四邊兩格遠的地方各放一台&2展示架&r，總共四台。

quest.5CD461E6C3E8E7D1.quest_desc.original: Found within the &3Deepslate&r ring, this vault is easy to get lost in.
quest.5CD461E6C3E8E7D1.quest_desc.translation: 可於&3深板岩&r環帶中找到，在此寶庫之中非常容易迷路。

quest.64123F6FE4DEB4EF.quest_desc.original: Claiming this quest reward will set a waypoint at the &dEcho's &6Archive&r entrance.
quest.64123F6FE4DEB4EF.quest_desc.translation: 領取該任務的任務獎勵會幫你在該&d回聲&r的&6檔案庫&r的入口處設置一個定位點。

quest.6461D19F839957B6.quest_desc.original:
The heat from the &cIgnitium Ingot&r will give the spirits infused in the &bSoulstained Steel Ingots&r the feeling of home...

The &6World Engine&r should be able to encase the spirits properly into a block that you can use for the &3Spirit World Engine Upgrade&r.
quest.6461D19F839957B6.quest_desc.translation:
來自&c熾焰錠&r的熱量帶給了&b魂染鋼&r之中的靈魂如家般溫暖的感覺...

&6世界引擎&r能夠好好的套住這種方塊中的靈魂，並使用它們作為&3魂銀世界引擎升級&r。

quest.6739E7A96309D0A8.quest_desc.original:
The &aCoercion Driver&r will convert energy to generate &bFortron&r over time.

&bFortron&r is mainly used to power your &eMFFS&r machines, but it can also be used to make more &#41AA71Fortron Infused Ingots&r in the &6World Engine&r once you have upgraded it.

&7&oMFFS machines require a redstone signal to run by default, most of which can be inverted in the upper left corner of the interface.
{@pagebreak}
The &aCoercion Deriver&r has two modes:

&eDerive Mode&r converts energy from other mods or dischargeable items in its inventory to generate &3Fortron&r.

&eIntegrate Mode&r converts &3Fortron&r into energy at a slight loss.

Placing &2Lapis&r or &2Nether Quartz&r inside will triple the &aCoercion Deriver's&r conversion rate when consumed.
quest.6739E7A96309D0A8.quest_desc.translation:
&a力場子衍生儀&r會隨著時間流逝緩慢地將能量轉換為&b力場子&r。

&b力場子&r是 &eMFFS&r 機器所需的能量，但它也能用在&6世界引擎&r\n中（如果你已經升級過它了），用以做出更多&#41AA71力場子充能錠&r。

&7&oMFFS 機器預設會需要紅石訊號才能運作，\n你可以透過介面左上角的按鍵來切換它。
{@pagebreak}
&a力場子衍生儀&r有著兩種模式：

&e衍生模式&r會將其他模組的能量或它欄位內的不可充能物品轉換為&3力場子&r。

&e整合模式&r會以輕微能量損失將&3力場子&r轉換回能量。

將&2青金石&r或&2地獄石英&r放在裡面會讓&a力場子衍生儀&r的轉換率變為三倍。

quest.695B2CCD18E5DDFE.quest_desc.original:
With more &6Archives&r unlocked, it is time to explore the lobby and find the &dEcho of The Infernal&r.

Work with this &dEcho&r to unlock the &bSpirit&r upgrade for your &6World Engine&r!

&7&oYou may teleport directly to this Echo from anywhere in the lobby after meeting them using &e/echo infernal&7.
quest.695B2CCD18E5DDFE.quest_desc.translation:
隨著更多&6檔案庫&r的解鎖，是時候探索大廳並找出&d煉獄炎魔之回聲&r了。

和這位&d回聲&r協力為你的&6世界引擎&r解鎖&3魂銀升級&r吧。

&7&o你可以在初訪這位回聲後，於大廳的任何地方使用下列指令傳送至他身旁：「&e/echo infernal&7」。

quest.70BB982228095E51.quest_desc.original:
To make the &cAdvanced Machine Blocks&r for the &6World Engine&r, you'll need a sturdy frame to start with.

Processing the frame requires creating &aPlastic&r. This can be used to make a machine capable of extracting a specific fluid from monsters.

["", {"text": "Note", "color": "yellow"}, ": ", {"text": "Latex", "color": "green"}, " can also be acquired by making a ", { "text": "Fluid Cow", "color": "dark_green", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": { "action": "change_page", "value": "150BB4679DD2B4B5" }, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "Go to Fluid Cows Quest"}}, "!" ]
quest.70BB982228095E51.quest_desc.translation:
如果你想要為&6世界引擎&r做出&c高級機器方塊&r的話，你會需要一個足夠結實的框架。

你會需要製作出一些&a塑膠片&r來打造這個框架。它能夠用來製造出一台能夠從怪物身上提取特定流體的機器。

["", {"text": "備註", "color": "yellow"}, "：你也能製造出一隻用來產出", {"text": "乳膠", "color": "green"}, "的", { "text": "流體牛", "color": "dark_green", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": { "action": "change_page", "value": "150BB4679DD2B4B5" }, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "前往「流體牛」任務"}}, "！" ]

quest.71F25B7D688EE182.quest_desc.original:
Completing the &bMaze Vault&r will reward you with at least 4 &bFortron Infused Blocks&r.

This is a &bMinor&r &6World Engine&r &bUpgrade&r that unlocks things like autocrafting or generating resources with an &aExtractor&r.

The &dEcho of The Light Bender&r should show you how to install this &3Upgrade&r.
quest.71F25B7D688EE182.quest_desc.translation:
完成&b迷宮寶庫&r能取得至少 4 個&b力場子灌注方塊&r作為獎勵。

這是一項&b小型&6世界引擎&b升級&r：它能夠解鎖像是自動合成或&a提取器&r等生產資源的方式。

&d光偽行者&r會告訴你該如何安裝此&3升級&r。

quest.727070B13B966DE1.quest_desc.original:
Submitting the blocks required for the &3Upgrade&f and claiming its rewards will automatically assemble your team's &6World Engine&r.

&eNote&f: Any blocks placed where an upgrade should go will be voided.
quest.727070B13B966DE1.quest_desc.translation:
提交該&3升級&r所需的方塊並領取該獎勵會自動將它組裝到你們隊伍的&6世界引擎&r之中。

&e備註&f：任何放置在該升級所需位置的所有方塊都會被銷毀。

quest.74EA9D857CB71A91.quest_desc.original:
Using a &aDissolution Chamber&r, you can infuse a Simple Machine Frame with &cNetherite&r and &#ffa5fcPink Slime&r.

This should create a frame strong enough to create the &cAdvanced Machine Blocks&r you need for the &6World Engine&r upgrade.
quest.74EA9D857CB71A91.quest_desc.translation:
你可以使用一台&a溶解室&r來將&c獄髓&r和&#ffa5fc粉紅史萊姆&r注入中級機器框架之中。

這樣你就能為&6世界引擎&r所需的&c高級機器方塊&r製造出一個足夠強大的框架了。

quest.7713D75A36D0A23D.quest_desc.original:
Setting up a &aQuantum Link&r in its designated spot and linking it to the main &6World Engine&r machine block using a pattern provider, your ME System will have a direct link to the &6World Engine&r, allowing you to directly request crafting recipes and processes from the &6World Engine&r.

&dThe Light Bender&r seems convinced that this relatively simple upgrade will change the way you interface with the &6World Engine&r.

&eNote&f: Each side of the &6World Engine&r must be configured individually for input and output.
quest.7713D75A36D0A23D.quest_desc.translation:
藉由在&6世界引擎&r預先設計好的位置安裝一條&a量子通道&r，並透過一台模板供應器將它連接到&6世界引擎&r上，你將能夠從你的 ME 系統直接向&6世界引擎&r發送合成請求。

&d光偽行者&r似乎非常確信這項相對簡單的升級將改變你和&6世界引擎&r之間的互動方式。

&e備註&f：&6世界引擎&r的每一邊都需要分別設置它們的輸入/輸出。

quest.787BD711CFF837C6.quest_desc.original:
With more &6Archives&r unlocked, it is time to explore the lobby and find the &dEcho of the Lightbender&r.

Work with this &dEcho&r to unlock the &bFortron Block&r upgrade for your &6World Engine&r!

&7&oYou may teleport directly to this Echo from anywhere in the lobby after meeting them using &e/echo light_bender&7.
quest.787BD711CFF837C6.quest_desc.translation:
隨著更多&6檔案庫&r的解鎖，是時候探索大廳並找出&d光偽行者之回聲&r了。

和這位&d回聲&r協力為你的&6世界引擎&r解鎖&3力場子方塊升級&r吧。

&7&o你可以在初訪這位回聲後，於大廳的任何地方使用下列指令傳送至他身旁：「&e/echo light_bender&7」。

quest.7AB7D06E0DD24F7A.quest_desc.original:
If you're struggling with the &3Vault&r, or killing &cIgnis&r, you may use this music disc in your offhand to &6Light Your Inner Fire&r.

This will generate 10x more heat for killing blazes and doing the dance puzzle, while also eliminating any penalty for missing colors.

It will also let you deal triple damage with all of your attacks against &cIgnis&r.
quest.7AB7D06E0DD24F7A.quest_desc.translation:
如果你在這座&3寶庫&r中遇到了困難，或是難以擊敗&c熾焰魔&r的話，你可以在副手使用這片唱片來&6點亮你心中之火&r。

它能夠產生十倍的熱量來幫助你擊殺烈焰使者或完成跳舞解謎，同時也會消除因錯過顏色而導致的任何懲罰。

它也能夠讓你對&c熾焰魔&r的所有攻擊造成三倍傷害。

quest.7DE26DE10C64D2E7.quest_desc.original: Claiming this quest reward will set a waypoint at the &dEcho's &6Archive&r entrance.
quest.7DE26DE10C64D2E7.quest_desc.translation: 領取該任務的任務獎勵會幫你在該&d回聲&r的&6檔案庫&r的入口處設置一個定位點。

quest.7E7745D3E460831F.quest_desc.original:
Those &aQuantum Links&r will be a great help as you require more and more automation from the &6World Engine&r.

Speak to &dThe Light Bender&r so they can show you where to install this &3World Engine Upgrade&r.
quest.7E7745D3E460831F.quest_desc.translation:
這條&a量子通道&r會是你為&6世界引擎&r進行大量自動化之路上的助力。

與&d光偽行者&r交談，這樣他就能夠教你該如何在&6世界引擎&r安裝這項升級了。

quest.7EEBD17F0EA6EE0C.quest_desc.original:
Submitting the blocks required for the &3Upgrade&f and claiming its rewards will automatically assemble your team's &6World Engine&r.

&cIMPORTANT&f: This upgrade will not affect anything in your &6World Engine&r except unlocking new recipes. Make sure you submit a freshly-crafted &aEnder Cell&r, as any upgrades applied to it will &cNOT&f be carried over.

&eNote&f: Any blocks placed where an upgrade should go will be voided.
quest.7EEBD17F0EA6EE0C.quest_desc.translation:
提交該&3升級&r所需的方塊並領取該獎勵會自動將它組裝到你們隊伍的&6世界引擎&r之中。

&e備註&f：任何放置在該升級所需位置的所有方塊都會被銷毀。

task.10414FF6D2800922.title.original: &fSpeak With The &dEcho of The Light Bender
